meaning: n.煮器(锅,壶的统称),汽锅,锅炉
examples: Pipes convey hot water from the boiler to the radiators.
With the new boiler you can make big savings on fuel bills.
He replaced the boiler when the last one began to spout flames.
It will create about 40 roles from boiler engineers to back office support staff.
The boiler installations are being designed and installed by two local companies based in Redruth.
